title: Hotel Checkout Statement Template
body_template:
Dear {{guest_name}},

Thank you for staying with us at {{hotel_name}}. We hope you had a pleasant experience. Please find below the details of your stay and the final statement.

Stay Details

  • Check-in Date: {{checkin_date}}
  • Check-out Date: {{checkout_date}}
  • Room Number: {{room_number}}
  • Total Room Nights: {{total_room_nights}}

Billing Summary

  • Room Charges: {{room_charges}} EGP
  • F&B Charges: {{fnb_charges}} EGP
  • Other Charges: {{other_charges}} EGP
  • Total Charges: {{total_charges}} EGP

If you have any questions regarding this statement, please contact our front desk at {{hotel_contact}}.

We look forward to welcoming you back to {{hotel_name}} in the future.

Best regards,

{{hotel_name}} Team

variables.name: room_number
variables.description: Room number assigned to the guest

variables.name: total_room_nights
variables.description: Total number of room nights stayed

variables.name: fnb_charges
variables.description: Total food and beverage charges in EGP
